title: Stenogrammitis micropecten
taxonomy: Stenogrammitis micropecten belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This family of plants is commonly known as the polypody family. The genus Stenogrammitis is a group of epiphytic ferns, which are plants that grow on other plants. Stenogrammitis micropecten is native to Central and South America. The classification of Stenogrammitis micropecten is within the division Pteridophyta.

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues.
